summary: Iteration 142: Unified 'Actions requises' Section Testing - All tests PASSED. Backend APIs (GET /api/appointments/my-timeline, GET /api/modifications/mine) return correct data structures with action_required, upcoming, past arrays and is_action_required field. Frontend Dashboard correctly renders the unified section when action items exist, and correctly hides it when no actions are pending. Navbar displays all required links with Arbitrage visible only for admin users.

backend_api_tests.test_timeline_returns_three_buckets_admi: PASS - Returns action_required, upcoming, past arrays with counts
backend_api_tests.test_timeline_item_structure: PASS - Items have required fields (appointment_id, role, status, action_required, etc.)
backend_api_tests.test_modifications_have_is_action_requir: PASS - Each proposal has is_action_required boolean field
backend_api_tests.test_disputes_mine_endpoint: PASS - Accessible for Litiges navbar badge
backend_api_tests.test_attendance_pending_endpoint: PASS - Accessible for Presences navbar badge

frontend_tests.admin_navbar_all_links: PASS - All 8 navbar links present: Agenda, Tableau de bord, Presences, Litiges, Decisions, Arbitrage, Contributions, Parametres
frontend_tests.participant_navbar_no_arbitrage: PASS - Arbitrage link NOT visible for non-admin (7 links)
frontend_tests.admin_dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard loads with title 'Bonjour, Test'
frontend_tests.participant_dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard loads with title 'Bonjour, Igaal'
frontend_tests.tabs_a_venir_historique: PASS - Both tabs visible and functional
frontend_tests.action_required_section_conditional: PASS - Section correctly hidden when no pending actions
frontend_tests.modification_pending_badge: PASS - 'Modification demandée' badge visible on timeline card
frontend_tests.modification_context_banner: PASS - Shows formatChangeSummary (Durée: 60 → 75 min · Lieu: Paris → Bureau B2)

critical_code_review_comments: OrganizerDashboard.js lines 982-1061: Unified 'Actions requises' section correctly implemented with conditional rendering
Line 983: Correct condition - renders only when timeline.action_required.length > 0 OR pendingModifications with is_action_required=true exist
Lines 996-1008: Sub-section 'Invitations & garanties' (data-testid='action-subsection-invitations') correctly renders ActionCards
Lines 1016-1057: Sub-section 'Modifications à valider' (data-testid='action-subsection-modifications') correctly renders modification cards with progress bars and 'Examiner' CTA
Lines 260-562: TimelineCard component correctly shows mod-action-badge, mod-pending-badge, and mod-context banners
Lines 219-258: formatChangeSummary helper correctly formats change details (Date, Durée, Lieu, Visio, Type)
AppNavbar.js: Correctly shows Arbitrage link only for admin users (line 123-127)
modification_routes.py GET /api/modifications/mine: Correctly returns is_action_required field (line 219)

test_credentials.participant: igaal@hotmail.com / Test123! (role=user, 4 upcoming, 77 past, has 1 pending modification)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified 'Actions requises' section fully implemented and tested. The section only renders when there are action items (invitations/guarantees OR modifications requiring action). When no actions are pending, the section is correctly hidden. Participant igaal@hotmail.com has a pending modification on 'Test Cancel A - Futur safe' appointment showing the modification context banner with formatChangeSummary and vote progress. Admin user testuser_audit@nlyt.app has no pending actions so the section is hidden for them. Login route is /signin.

rca_of_the_issue.original_task: Merge 'Actions requises' (invitations/guarantees) and 'Modifications en attente' sections into one unified structured section on Dashboard
rca_of_the_issue.implementation_verified: OrganizerDashboard.js lines 982-1061 correctly implements the unified section with two sub-sections: 'Invitations & garanties' and 'Modifications à valider'
rca_of_the_issue.conditional_rendering: Section only renders when timeline.action_required.length > 0 OR pendingModifications.filter(p => p.is_action_required).length > 0
rca_of_the_issue.data_testids_verified: action-required-section, action-subsection-invitations, action-subsection-modifications, mod-action-card-*, mod-progress-*, mod-action-cta-*, mod-action-badge-*, mod-pending-badge-*, mod-context-*, mod-timeline-progress-*
